metadata.description: The official Ryu marketplace: curated agents, apps, skills, tools, and MCP servers. Submit yours via a pull request or the in-app publish flow.

plugins.name: ghost
plugins.description: Desktop automation: 29 screen perception and input control tools. Snapshot the screen, reference elements by @eN, click/type/scroll, and record then replay recipes. Windows-first.

plugins.name: shadow
plugins.tagline: Screen and audio capture with memory
plugins.description: Screen and audio capture, OCR, proactive engine, semantic memory and search, timeline keyframes, and meeting capture/detection.

plugins.name: spider
plugins.description: High-performance web crawler and scraper for pulling content off the web into an agent's context.

plugins.name: exa
plugins.description: Neural search: find any content on the web. Requires EXA_API_KEY.

setup.title: Exa API key
setup.description: Set EXA_API_KEY to enable neural web search.

plugins.name: headroom
plugins.description: Context compression (chopratejas/headroom): compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks. 60-95% fewer tokens with reversible retrieval. Requires headroom-ai[mcp].

plugins.name: checklist
plugins.description: Interactive checklist widget: tick off, edit inline, and approve items directly in chat.

plugins.name: smart-intake-form
plugins.description: Pre-filled intake form widget with native pickers and validation.

plugins.name: data-grid-explorer
plugins.description: Sortable, filterable, virtualized data grid widget; full rows stay out of model context.

plugins.name: chart-studio
plugins.description: Interactive chart widget (line/bar/area/scatter) with legend toggles and brush select.

plugins.name: decision-wizard
plugins.description: Step-by-step decision flow widget (quiz/weighted/compare) with a running tally.

plugins.name: quest-board
plugins.description: Kanban quest board widget backed by the quests subsystem.

plugins.name: worktree-diff-review
plugins.description: Per-file, per-hunk diff review widget backed by Core's git-native worktree/diff/apply.

plugins.name: gateway-budget-dial
plugins.description: Radial spent-vs-limit budget meter widget; the literal Gateway moat surface.
